visualizerParams.title: Optimizing Binary XOR with `^`
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The provided code manually performs bitwise XOR by iterating over strings. Refactor it to use Python's built-in `^` operator, which is the standard and most efficient way to perform bitwise operations.

solution.explanation: Python's `^` operator performs bitwise XOR directly on integers at the hardware level. This is significantly faster than manual string-based processing and is the idiomatic way to handle bitwise logic.
